name: orchestrator-loop
description: A reusable agentic-engineering framework. Freezes the rules -> roadmap -> PRD -> handoff -> verify loop, its structural guardrails, AND its epistemics (a-surprising-good-result-is-a-data-bug skepticism, out-of-fold + FDR analytical rigor, forensic verification, intellectual honesty) so any app can be driven by a planning/QA orchestrator that hands execution to a coding agent. App specifics, sanity bounds, and connectors are supplied per install.
